claim: Birth-weight is positively associated with breast cancer.
evidence_sentences: The majority of studies identified a positive link between birthweight and premenopausal, but not postmenopausal, breast cancer.

The relative risk estimate for breast cancer comparing women with high birthweight to women with low birthweight combining all studies including both pre- and postmenopausal breast cancer was 1.23 (95% confidence interval 1.13-1.34).
